title: Bare Bones x RAY's 3D Rails
description: Bare Bones textures for RAY's 3D Rails !
body:
![Bare Bones x Ray's 3D Rails logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b80a7e81487e8370b5a03c3b8e23e3beae7642e.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [RAY's 3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-rails) !

⚙️You have to place it above the default RAY's 3D Rails in the resource pack list

- This resource pack is contained in [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) ! It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs

> [Bare Bones x RAY's 3D Ladders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-rays-3d-ladders) is now also available !
